message:
fix(algorithms): is_tree self-loop + betweenness_centrality normalization

Two bugs found during fresh-eyes code review:

1. is_tree: single-node graph with self-loop was incorrectly classified
   as a tree. Fixed by checking m==0 in addition to n==1 for the
   single-node early return.

2. betweenness_centrality: undirected normalization used 2.0/((n-1)(n-2))
   but should use 1.0/((n-1)(n-2)). Brandes already double-counts for
   undirected via all-source BFS; the extra 2x was wrong. Results were
   exactly 2x NetworkX values. Now matches NetworkX exactly.

3. (Already committed) Graph/MultiGraph self-loop degree: fixed to count
   self-loops as contributing 2 to degree (NetworkX convention).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
